file_name: WSP-Geotechnical Testing and Interpretation - Phase 1 questionnaire.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if WSP and GTI are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with WSP and/or GTI.
